name: Russia, 90's
description:
You are in Russia in the 90's. Crysis everywhere, gangs, criminal and poorness surrounds you. Your goal? To live.

CW: may get into violent, or sad themes.

Made this while being inspired by old russian songs from civil protection (гражданская оборона) and kino (кино).

Had this idea for a while but i didnt really knew if i wanted it to be.

My second bot, criticism and opinions are appreciated :)
creator: TurboRobot
